title: Some users' Windows Intune devices may intermittently drop device policy assignments
impact: Users' Windows Intune devices may intermittently drop specific policy assignments.

updates.content:
Title: Some users' Windows Intune devices may intermittently drop device policy assignments

User impact: Users' Windows Intune devices may intermittently drop specific policy assignments. 

More info: The affected device policies include:
-Endpoint Privilege Management
-Microsoft Defender for Endpoint
-Device Inventory

Current status: We're reviewing recent service updates and system logs to understand the source of the issue, which will help us determine our next troubleshooting steps.

Scope of impact: This issue may intermittently impact some users' Windows Intune devices between check-ins.

Start time: Tuesday, April 28, 2026, at 12:30 PM UTC

Next update by: Saturday, May 2, 2026, at 12:00 PM UTC

Title: Some users' Windows Intune devices may intermittently drop device policy assignments

User impact: Users' Windows Intune devices may intermittently drop specific policy assignments.

More info: The affected device policies include, but aren't limited to:

-Endpoint Privilege Management
-Microsoft Defender for Endpoint
-Device Inventory

Current status: We've identified that a code regression introduced during the rollout of a recent update associated with a new preview feature is causing impact to occur. We've developed a fix to address this issue and are currently validating it prior to deployment. In parallel, we're preparing a mitigation script that may be executed to provide interim relief while the validated fix is deployed.

Scope of impact: This issue may intermittently impact some users' Windows Intune devices between check-ins.

Start time: Tuesday, April 28, 2026, at 12:30 PM UTC

Root cause: A code regression introduced during the rollout of a recent update associated with a new preview feature is causing impact to occur.

Next update by: Saturday, May 02, 2026, at 7:00 PM UTC

Title: Some users' Windows Intune devices may intermittently drop device policy assignments

User impact: Users' Windows Intune devices may intermittently drop specific policy assignments.

More info: The affected device policies include, but aren't limited to:

-Endpoint Privilege Management
-Microsoft Defender for Endpoint
-Device Inventory

Current status: We've completed the validations for our fix and initiated the deployment to the affected environment. We anticipate the deployment will complete by our next scheduled communications update, and we'll monitor service health telemetry once complete to ensure the issue has been resolved. We've also determined that running the aforementioned mitigation script isn't necessary.

Scope of impact: This issue may intermittently impact some users' Windows Intune devices between check-ins.

Start time: Tuesday, April 28, 2026, at 12:30 PM UTC

Root cause: A code regression introduced during the rollout of a recent update associated with a new preview feature is causing impact to occur.

Next update by: Saturday, May 02, 2026, at 9:00 PM UTC
